subject: The aged lead math that changes everything
previewText: Why paying 90% less can deliver 300% better ROI (with the spreadsheet to prove it)

featuredArticle.title: How to Work Aged Leads: The Complete System for Maximum ROI
featuredArticle.spotlight: This is the definitive guide to aged lead conversion that everyone's been asking for. I break down the complete economics, the proven follow-up sequences, and why aged leads often outperform fresh ones for experienced sales teams.
